name: notebin

metadata.name: NoteBin
metadata.summary: A tool package for writing notes

documentation: A tool package for writing notes for Mr. CaoBin

variables.name: NoteBin.directory_to_process
documentation: You can change this path if needed

functions.name: NoteBin.notetaker.fetch_paper_info
documentation:
Fetch paper information from the Semantic Scholar API based on the title.

Args:
    title (str): The title of the paper to search.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary containing the paper's title, year, citations, abstract,
          first author, author's affiliation, corresponding author, and contact.
          Returns None if no information is found.

functions.name: NoteBin.notetaker.process_md_file
documentation:
Process a Markdown file, extract 'PaperTitle', and append related information to the file.

Args:
    md_file_path (str): The path to the Markdown file.

functions.name: NoteBin.notetaker.process_all_md_files
documentation:
Traverse a directory and process all Markdown (.md) files.

Args:
    directory (str): The directory to search for Markdown files.
